---
title: "ptm"
author: "Swanitha"
date: "2026-02-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)

dir.create("tf_ptm_results", showWarnings = FALSE)
# ── 1. Load mod summary ────────────────────────────────────────
setwd("/mnt/data/swanitha/ptm/")
mods <- read.delim("global.modsummary.tsv", sep = "\t")


# Mean PSMs per fraction
chrom_cols <- grep("Chrom.*PSMs$",   names(mods), value = TRUE)
sol_cols   <- grep("Sol.*PSMs$",     names(mods), value = TRUE)

mods$Chrom_mean <- rowMeans(mods[, chrom_cols])
mods$Sol_mean   <- rowMeans(mods[, sol_cols])
mods$log2FC     <- log2((mods$Chrom_mean + 0.1) / (mods$Sol_mean + 0.1))
mods$Total      <- rowSums(mods[, c(chrom_cols, sol_cols)])

# ── 2. Split: known vs unknown ─────────────────────────────────
unknown <- mods %>% filter(grepl("^Unannotated", Modification)) %>%
           arrange(desc(Total))

known   <- mods %>% filter(!grepl("^Unannotated|^None|isotop", Modification,
                                  ignore.case = TRUE))

# ── 3. Key PTMs for TFs ────────────────────────────────────────
tf_ptms <- known %>%
  filter(grepl("Phospho|Acetyl|Methyl|Ubiq|Hex|Glyco|Oxidat|Nitros|Formyl",
               Modification, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  select(Modification, Mass.Shift, Chrom_mean, Sol_mean, log2FC, Total) %>%
  arrange(desc(Total))

cat("\n=== TF-relevant PTMs ===\n")
print(tf_ptms)

# ── 4. Top unknown mods ────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== Top Unknown Mods ===\n")
print(head(unknown[, c("Modification","Mass.Shift","Chrom_mean","Sol_mean","log2FC","Total")], 15))

# ── 5. Plot: Chrom vs Sol for key PTMs ────────────────────────
p <- tf_ptms %>%
  mutate(Mod = substr(Modification, 1, 35),
         Direction = ifelse(log2FC > 0, "Chromatin", "Soluble")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Mod, log2FC), y = log2FC, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Chromatin" = "#e74c3c", "Soluble" = "#3498db")) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "PTM enrichment: Chromatin vs Soluble",
       x = NULL, y = "log2(Chrom / Sol)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("tf_ptm_results/chrom_vs_sol.png", p, width = 8, height = 5)
cat("\nPlot saved: tf_ptm_results/chrom_vs_sol.png\n")

# ── 6. Load proteins, grep for TFs ────────────────────────────
prot <- read.delim("combined_protein.tsv", sep = "\t", row.names = NULL)
# Verify Gene column now has correct names
head(prot$Gene, 10)

cat("\nProtein file columns:\n")
print(names(prot)[1:15])

tf_keywords <- "TP53|MYC|SP[1-4]|STAT|E2F|GATA|FOX|SOX|CTCF|YY1|JUN|FOS|SMAD|RUNX|KLF|IRF|BRD|EP300|CREBBP|TAF|TBP|NFKB|RELA|MED[0-9]|REST|HDAC|KAT|PCAF|SETD|EZH|SUZ"

tf_prots <- prot %>%
  filter(
    grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name,  ignore.case = TRUE) |
    grepl(tf_keywords, Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

cat("\nTF proteins found:", nrow(tf_prots), "\n")
head(tf_prots$Entry.Name, 20)


# ── 7. TF chromatin vs soluble counts ─────────────────────────  ← ADD HERE
tf_counts <- tf_prots %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Description, contains("Spectral.Count"))

tf_counts$Chrom_mean <- rowMeans(
  tf_counts[, grep("Chrom.*Spectral", names(tf_counts))])
tf_counts$Sol_mean <- rowMeans(
  tf_counts[, grep("Sol.*Spectral", names(tf_counts))])
tf_counts$log2FC <- log2((tf_counts$Chrom_mean + 0.1) /
                         (tf_counts$Sol_mean   + 0.1))

cat("\nTop chromatin-enriched TFs:\n")
print(
  tf_counts %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
    select(Entry.Name, Chrom_mean, Sol_mean, log2FC) %>%
    head(20)
)

# ── 8. Load PSM files ─────────────────────────────────────────
samples <- c("Chrom_01","Chrom_02","Chrom_03","Chrom_04",
             "Sol_01","Sol_02","Sol_03","Sol_04")

psm_all <- lapply(samples, function(s) {
  f <- paste0("/mnt/data/swanitha/ptm/", s, "/", s, "_psm.tsv")
  cat("Reading:", s, "\n")
  df <- read.delim(f, sep = "\t")
  df$Sample   <- s
  df$Fraction <- ifelse(grepl("Chrom", s), "Chrom", "Sol")
  df
}) %>% bind_rows()

cat("Total PSMs loaded:", nrow(psm_all), "\n")

# ── 9. Filter: TFs only, no decoy/contaminant, has modification ─
tf_psms <- psm_all %>%
  filter(
    Is.Decoy       == "false",
    Is.Contaminant == "false",
    grepl(tf_keywords, Entry.Name, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Assigned.Modifications != "" & Assigned.Modifications != "0"
  )

cat("TF PSMs with modifications:", nrow(tf_psms), "\n")

# ── 10. Summarise: which TF has which modification ─────────────
tf_mod_sites <- tf_psms %>%
  select(Entry.Name, Gene, Peptide, Modified.Peptide,
         Protein.Start, Protein.End,
         Assigned.Modifications, Fraction, Sample) %>%
  arrange(Entry.Name, Fraction)

cat("\nTop modified TFs:\n")
print(
  tf_mod_sites %>%
    group_by(Entry.Name, Assigned.Modifications, Fraction) %>%
    summarise(PSM_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(PSM_count)) %>%
    head(30)
)

# ── 11. Remove artifacts, keep biological mods ─────────────────
artifact_pattern <- "57\\.0214|15\\.9949"

tf_bio_mods <- tf_mod_sites %>%
  filter(!grepl(artifact_pattern, Assigned.Modifications))

cat("TF PSMs after removing artifacts:", nrow(tf_bio_mods), "\n")

print(
  tf_bio_mods %>%
    group_by(Entry.Name, Assigned.Modifications, Fraction) %>%
    summarise(PSM_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(PSM_count)) %>%
    head(30)
)

# ── 12. Save final Excel ───────────────────────────────────────
write_xlsx(list(
  TF_PTMs      = tf_ptms,
  Unknown_mods = head(unknown, 50),
  Known_all    = known,
  TF_proteins  = tf_prots,
  TF_Chrom_Sol = tf_counts,
  TF_PTM_sites = tf_mod_sites,
  TF_bio_mods  = tf_bio_mods,
  Full_summary = mods
), "tf_ptm_results/TF_PTM_results.xlsx")

cat("Saved: tf_ptm_results/TF_PTM_results.xlsx\n")
```
